title: The Selkirk Boomstick, According to 21 Reviewers
description: A synthesis of 21 transcribed video reviews of the Selkirk Boomstick power paddle. Consensus on its elite power, ~2300 RPM spin, and record sweet spot; genuine disputes over the $333 price, grit longevity, and edge-guard durability. Lab-tested and non-sponsored voices weighted most heavily.
